name: Netlify
description: Netlify provides web deployment, serverless functions, form handling, DNS management, and CDN distribution for modern web applications. Use this API to manage sites, deploys, environment variables, DNS zones, forms, build hooks, split tests, and SSL certificates.

capabilities.name: accounts_get
capabilities.description: Get details of a specific account.

capabilities.name: accounts_list
capabilities.description: List all accounts accessible to the current user.

capabilities.name: build_hooks_create
capabilities.description: Create a build hook (URL to trigger deploys).

capabilities.name: build_hooks_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a build hook.

capabilities.name: build_hooks_list
capabilities.description: List all build hooks for a site.

capabilities.name: builds_create
capabilities.description: Trigger a new build for a site.

capabilities.name: builds_list
capabilities.description: List all builds for a site.

capabilities.name: cache_purge
capabilities.description: Purge the CDN cache for a site.

capabilities.name: deploy_keys_create
capabilities.description: Create a new deploy key.

capabilities.name: deploy_keys_list
capabilities.description: List all deploy keys.

capabilities.name: deployed_branches_list
capabilities.description: List all deployed branches for a site.

capabilities.name: deploys_cancel
capabilities.description: Cancel a deploy that is currently building.

capabilities.name: deploys_create
capabilities.description: Create a new deploy for a site (trigger a build).

capabilities.name: deploys_get
capabilities.description: Get details for a specific deploy.

capabilities.name: deploys_list
capabilities.description: List all deploys for a specific site.

capabilities.name: deploys_lock
capabilities.description: Lock a deploy to prevent auto-publishing.

capabilities.name: deploys_restore
capabilities.description: Restore a previous deploy, making it the live version of the site.

capabilities.name: deploys_rollback
capabilities.description: Rollback a site to a previous deploy.

capabilities.name: deploys_unlock
capabilities.description: Unlock a previously locked deploy.

capabilities.name: dns_records_create
capabilities.description: Create a new DNS record in a zone.

capabilities.name: dns_records_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a DNS record from a zone.

capabilities.name: dns_records_list
capabilities.description: List all DNS records in a zone.

capabilities.name: dns_zones_create
capabilities.description: Create a new DNS zone.

capabilities.name: dns_zones_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a DNS zone.

capabilities.name: dns_zones_get
capabilities.description: Get details of a specific DNS zone.

capabilities.name: dns_zones_list
capabilities.description: List all DNS zones in your account.

capabilities.name: env_vars_create
capabilities.description: Create new environment variables for a site.

capabilities.name: env_vars_delete
capabilities.description: Delete an environment variable.

capabilities.name: env_vars_list
capabilities.description: List all environment variables for a site.

capabilities.name: env_vars_update
capabilities.description: Update an environment variable.

capabilities.name: files_list
capabilities.description: List all files in the current deploy of a site.

capabilities.name: forms_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a form and all its submissions.

capabilities.name: forms_list
capabilities.description: List all forms detected on a deployed site.

capabilities.name: functions_list
capabilities.description: List all serverless functions deployed on a site.

capabilities.name: hooks_create
capabilities.description: Create a notification webhook for a site.

capabilities.name: hooks_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a notification webhook.

capabilities.name: hooks_list
capabilities.description: List all notification webhooks for a site.

capabilities.name: metadata_get
capabilities.description: Get metadata for a site.

capabilities.name: metadata_update
capabilities.description: Update metadata for a site.

capabilities.name: sites_create
capabilities.description: Create a new Netlify site. Optionally link to a Git repository.

capabilities.name: sites_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a Netlify site permanently.

capabilities.name: sites_disable
capabilities.description: Disable a site (block all traffic).

capabilities.name: sites_enable
capabilities.description: Re-enable a previously disabled site.

capabilities.name: sites_get
capabilities.description: Get detailed information about a specific site including deploy settings and SSL.

capabilities.name: sites_list
capabilities.description: List all sites in your Netlify account with deployment status and URLs.

capabilities.name: sites_unlink_repo
capabilities.description: Unlink a Git repository from a site.

capabilities.name: sites_update
capabilities.description: Update a site's settings including build configuration and custom domain.

capabilities.name: snippets_create
capabilities.description: Create a code snippet to inject into a site.

capabilities.name: snippets_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a code snippet.

capabilities.name: snippets_list
capabilities.description: List all code snippets injected into a site.

capabilities.name: split_tests_create
capabilities.description: Create a new A/B split test for a site.

capabilities.name: split_tests_disable
capabilities.description: Disable a split test.

capabilities.name: split_tests_enable
capabilities.description: Enable a split test.

capabilities.name: split_tests_list
capabilities.description: List all A/B split tests for a site.

capabilities.name: ssl_get
capabilities.description: Show the TLS/SSL certificate for a site.

capabilities.name: ssl_provision
capabilities.description: Provision a TLS/SSL certificate for a site.

capabilities.name: submissions_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a specific form submission.

capabilities.name: submissions_list
capabilities.description: List all submissions for a specific form.

capabilities.name: user_get
capabilities.description: Get the currently authenticated user's information.
